Notes: Single UPDATE deletes the existing y.campus.edu. A RRset and then adds a new A RR in the same RRset. The server's intra-message ordering/combination policy is the only point under test.

Steps.Description: Delete the existing y.campus.edu. A RRset and then add a new A RR to the same RRset in one UPDATE, with no prerequisites.

Steps.Name: y.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the A RRset exists after the UPDATE and, if so, which address remains.
